name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. This Capucines BB handbag features a refined structure crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather. It is equipped with a top handle, double-flap, and a glossy python-embossed logo, making it a stunning choice for day or night. A detachable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear to show off a modern look. Size: 27 * 18 * 9 cm
